title: Add directAssign field whitelist to CategoryMappingService addMapping/updateMapping
description: Add whitelist #MAPPING_FIELDS = new Set(['name', 'targetCategory', 'keywords', 'enabled', 'directAssign']) and implement #stripFields(raw) helper that returns a new object containing only whitelisted keys. Update addMapping() and updateMapping() to call #stripFields(raw) before processing. In addMapping, set directAssign: Boolean(clean.directAssign ?? false). In updateMapping, if 'directAssign' in clean, coerce to Boolean before merging. This prevents arbitrary field injection via spread-merge from req.body.
notes: Whitelist mitigates discovery risk R2 (spread-merge field injection). Behavior change is safe: the only extra fields previously persisted were created/updated (server-managed, sent via form). No client sends non-whitelisted fields in production. Existing mappings without directAssign field retain undefined (backward-compat per DEC-0021).
verification_steps: #stripFields(raw) returns object containing only keys that exist in both raw and the whitelist.
addMapping() accepts directAssign from input, stores as Boolean (default false).
updateMapping() accepts directAssign updates, coerces to Boolean when present in updates.
Spread-merge no longer persists arbitrary fields — only whitelisted keys survive.
Existing mappings without directAssign field retain undefined (backward-compat).
All 18/18 existing tests pass (no behavior change to AI-hint path).
